tasks.title: Add migration for nullable bases JSON column
tasks.description: Add a new migration class under lib/Migration/ that adds a nullable JSON column `bases` to oc_openregister_entity_relations. Use the platform's existing JSON column type (match other JSON columns in OpenRegister, e.g. on oc_openregister_objects). Default value: NULL.

tasks.title: Verify migration is idempotent
tasks.description: Confirm running the migration twice on the same database is a no-op (Nextcloud's addColumn primitive is idempotent).

tasks.title: Smoke-test migration on populated dev DB
tasks.description: Confirm existing EntityRelation rows are read correctly post-migration and bases reads as null for all of them.

tasks.title: Add bases field to EntityRelation
tasks.description: Add `protected ?array $bases = null;` to lib/Db/EntityRelation.php.

tasks.title: Register bases as JSON type in constructor
tasks.description: Add `addType(fieldName: 'bases', type: 'json');` in EntityRelation::__construct().

tasks.title: Add getter/setter docblocks for bases
tasks.description: Add the getBases(): ?array and setBases(?array $bases): void magic-method docblocks to the class header (mirroring the existing pattern for other fields).

tasks.title: Update jsonSerialize to include bases
tasks.description: Order it after anonymizedValue for consistency.

tasks.title: Update psalm/phpdoc return type on jsonSerialize
tasks.description: Include bases in the documented return type.

tasks.title: Confirm/update EntityRelationMapper for bases
tasks.description: Nextcloud's QBMapper handles columns registered via addType automatically. If the mapper has manual select(...) lists, update those.

tasks.title: Accept optional bases per entity in anonymise payload
tasks.description: In FileService::anonymizeDocument (or equivalent), accept an optional bases field on each entry. Validate: when present, MUST be null or array of strings. Reject malformed input with 400.

tasks.title: Implement persist-then-strip order
tasks.description: For each entry: locate or upsert the EntityRelation row; set anonymized, anonymizedValue, bases; persist BEFORE the OpenAnonymiser HTTP call.

tasks.title: Strip bases from OpenAnonymiser request body
tasks.description: Construct the OpenAnonymiser request body from a copy of payload.entities[] with bases removed from every entry. Confirm byte-equivalence with pre-change shape.

tasks.title: Confirm no cross-register UUID validation
tasks.description: The mapper does NOT issue any cross-register lookup to validate the supplied UUIDs.

tasks.title: EntityRelationTest covering bases round-trip
tasks.description: getBases/setBases round-trip; jsonSerialize includes bases; null vs empty-array distinction preserved.

tasks.title: EntityRelationMapperTest cases for bases column
tasks.description: Insert with bases; without bases (defaults null); update bases on existing row; non-UUID strings accepted; idempotent migration smoke test.

tasks.title: FileServiceTest for persist+strip behaviour
tasks.description: Persist precedes OpenAnonymiser call; OpenAnonymiser receives a request body without bases; OpenAnonymiser failure preserves persisted bases.

tasks.title: Newman test for bases-populated anonymise call
tasks.description: 200 response; EntityRelation row queried directly returns the correct bases.

tasks.title: Newman test for no-bases path (regression)
tasks.description: Pre-change-shape payload still works, returns identical behaviour.

tasks.title: Smoke-test opencatalogi anonymise flow (if any)
tasks.description: Confirm no break.

tasks.title: Smoke-test DocuDesk's existing anonymise calls
tasks.description: Without bases — confirm no break.

tasks.title: Inspect OpenAnonymiser request body via debug logging
tasks.description: Confirm the body shape is unchanged from pre-change.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG entry under Added
tasks.description: New optional bases column on EntityRelation; persist+strip behaviour on the anonymise endpoint.

tasks.title: Document bases-strip in OpenAnonymiser interface contract
tasks.description: Update the OpenAnonymiser interface contract documentation (if it exists in docs/) to note bases is recognised but stripped before the call. Else add a one-line code comment on FileService::anonymizeDocument.

tasks.title: Full unit test suite clean
tasks.description: All unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Static analysis (Psalm / PHPStan) clean
tasks.description: At project's configured strictness.

tasks.title: Code style (PHPCS) clean
tasks.description: At project config.

tasks.title: Manual smoke against live stack
tasks.description: Anonymise call with bases populated; confirm EntityRelation row has bases; confirm OpenAnonymiser was not sent the bases.

tasks.title: openspec validate clean
tasks.description: Run openspec validate entity-relation-grondslagen.
